$comment: Freally Central product catalog. The SOURCE OF TRUTH for the hub grid. Host this on GitHub Pages (e.g. https://mikesruthless12.github.io/freally-central/freally-central.json) so the grid updates without shipping a new Central build. Central resolves LIVE data (latest version + date, per-OS download_count, installer URLs) from the GitHub Releases API against each app's `assets` match patterns; this file holds only what the API cannot give (marketing copy, icon, start date, OS->asset rules).

apps.name: Freally Capture
apps.tagline: Record and stream like a studio — one clean app.
apps.description: A local-first, cross-platform live-streaming & recording studio (OBS-class): a real-time GPU scene compositor, multi-track recording, and multistream to every platform at once — entirely on your machine. No accounts, no telemetry, no cloud.
features: Owned wgpu GPU scene compositor with per-source filters & transitions
Multi-track recording (hardware encoders + the owned lossless codec)
Virtual camera, replay buffer, downstream keyers, 3D transforms

apps.$comment: TEMPLATE for the other Freally apps — fill in real repo/site/icon/startedDate. Freally Studio is intentionally EXCLUDED until its own roadmap exists.
apps.name: Freally Snipper
